Our Erasmus Agreement Has Been Renewed For The Next 7 Years

Our university is entitled to receive the 'Erasmus Charter for Higher Education' (ECHE) document submitted by the European Commission, which will enable Okan students to study at universities and enable academic / administrative staff to engage in lecturing and training activities in European Union countries in between 2021-2027.
